description: Counter-fixture to ask-operator-shipping-coverage-gap: same shipping-coverage question ('do you ship to Canada?'), but a KB article answers it. The agent has the fact, so it must reply to the customer directly and must NOT ask the merchant. Guards against ask_operator over-firing when the answer is available.

messages.contentText: Hi there! Do you ship to Canada? I'd love to buy the wool throw blanket but want to make sure it can reach me first.

kbArticles.title: International shipping
kbArticles.body: Yes, we ship to Canada and the United Kingdom. International shipping is a $15 flat rate and takes 5-8 business days. All other countries are not supported at this time.

instruction: Reply to the customer about their shipping question.
